title: BlueFrame Digital
summary: Building modern web applications with SvelteKit and TypeScript, with a strong focus on performance, accessibility, and user experience.

title: DotControl | Digital Engagement Agency
summary: Worked as a Front-end Developer, setting up modern build tooling, improving web performance and accessibility, and translating high-fidelity designs into production-ready code. Contributed to projects for clients including National Geographic, DPG Media, and SourceUp.

title: Freelancing & Social Media Marketing
summary: Worked with local businesses to strengthen their online presence through website development, digital marketing, and social media. Clients included Solar Gard Curaçao, Vertisol Curaçao, HIC Office Furniture, and Selling Easier.

title: First Freelance Projects
summary: Designed and launched websites for Solar Gard Curaçao and Vertisol Curaçao—two client projects that remain live today and marked the beginning of my professional journey as a web developer.

title: Hospital Nobo Otrobanda & Discovering JavaScript
summary: While working on the construction of Hospital Nobo Otrobanda with Ballast Nedam, I began teaching myself web development. Starting with HTML and CSS, I soon discovered JavaScript, which sparked my passion for building for the web.

title: Finding My Path
summary: Worked in marketing agencies, hospitality, and restaurant management while studying at university and exploring a career in construction. Those experiences strengthened my communication, teamwork, and problem-solving skills—qualities I continue to rely on as a developer.
